headline: ILLINOIS TOOL WORKS (NYSE:ITW): A Top Dividend Stock with Strong Profitability and Sustainable Payouts
summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) offers a strong 2.58% dividend yield backed by a 7.19% growth rate, exceptional profitability, and a solid 57% payout ratio, making it a quality income investment.
